notes: Forest/infantry/economy specialist Unique base — one instance on the map, found in a large forest biome; ALL of its buildings can be placed on Forest OR Plains tiles (terrainException — Forest is an additional allowed site terrain, not a replacement for the Plains default), not just Lumber Mill. A building with its own explicit siteTerrain (e.g. Lumber Mill's generic Plains+adjacent-Forest, Forest Yard's Forest-only) also gets Forest as an alternative valid site via this exception, and placing directly on Forest this way skips any adjacentTerrainRequired check (see BuildingPlacement.can_place). Forest Yard builds Quad-bike (its only unlock — ignores the forest vehicle-block rule); Barracks (shared building type — see data/buildings/barracks.json for the full list of bases that build it) gives Treehouse its own infantry roster too. Wood Turret is its specialty defense — a Turret variant carrying Wood Tower's stats and addsTurretPerLevel swarm-clearing identity wholesale (see data/buildings/wood_turret.json), fitting Treehouse's Quad-bike-heavy, fast/weak-unit garrison. +100% Wood bonus is a building-scoped resourceModifiers entry on Lumber Mill (multiplier 2.0), not a base-wide bonus, mirroring Foundry Reach's +100% Steel pattern.
